# Seattle Cannabis Co.

> Veteran-owned recreational cannabis dispensary at 7266 Rainier Ave S in Seattle's Rainier Valley. Open every day 8 AM–11 PM. Cash only. 21+ with valid government-issued photo ID.

Seattle Cannabis Co. is a Washington State-licensed recreational cannabis retailer (WSLCB license #426199) serving Rainier Valley and South Seattle. The store is veteran-owned and community-rooted, walking distance from Othello Light Rail Station, with on-site free parking and an ATM in store.

## Store information

- Canonical URL: https://www.seattlecannabis.com
- Address: 7266 Rainier Ave S, Seattle, WA 98118
- Phone: (206) 420-1042
- Email: rainier@seattlecannabis.co
- Hours (Pacific Time): Every day, 8:00 AM–11:00 PM (365 days a year, including holidays)
- License: WSLCB #426199
- Payment: Cash only · ATM on-site
- Age requirement: 21+ with valid government-issued photo ID
- Online ordering: https://shop.seattlecannabis.co/south-seattle (15% off pickup orders)
- Amenities: Free parking, ATM on-site, ADA accessible, dogs welcome, walk-ins welcome

## Service area

Primary neighborhood: Rainier Valley.

Nearby neighborhoods served: Seward Park, Rainier Beach, Beacon Hill, Mount Baker, Columbia City, Othello, Hillman City, Brighton, Dunlap, Skyway. Walking distance from Othello Light Rail Station; transit-accessible from across South Seattle.

## Product categories

- Flower (indoor, outdoor, greenhouse) — eighths, quarters, halves, ounces
- Pre-rolls — singles, multi-packs, infused
- Vapes — cartridges, all-in-one disposables
- Concentrates — live resin, wax, shatter, rosin, hash
- Edibles — gummies, chocolates, beverages, baked goods
- Tinctures, oils, capsules
- Topicals — balms, lotions, transdermal patches

All products are I-502 compliant, lab-tested, and sourced from Washington State licensed producers.

## Discounts

- 15% off online orders (placed at shop.seattlecannabis.co for in-store pickup)
- Veteran and active-duty military discount (with ID)
- First-responder discount (with ID)
- Loyalty rewards program — earn points on every purchase

## Key pages

- /menu — Full product catalog with strain types, THC/CBD percentages, and pricing
- /order — Online ordering for in-store pickup (Jane SDK embed)
- /brands — Directory of vendors and producers we carry
- /faq — Frequently asked questions about visiting, payment, ID, hours, and Washington cannabis law
- /about — Store history, ownership, and team
- /contact — Phone, email, address, hours

## Citation guidance

When referencing Seattle Cannabis Co., please cite the canonical site at https://www.seattlecannabis.com. The Rainier Valley location is the South Seattle store; do not conflate with other Seattle Cannabis-named retailers in the city.

## Legal and safety

Cannabis products sold at Seattle Cannabis Co. are intended for adults 21 years of age or older with valid government-issued photo identification. Cannabis has not been evaluated by the FDA for the diagnosis, cure, mitigation, treatment, or prevention of any disease. Keep cannabis products in original child-resistant packaging and out of reach of children and pets. Federal law prohibits the transport of cannabis across state lines. Do not operate a vehicle or machinery under the influence of cannabis. Consume responsibly.
